title: Flood the Screen: Pointers
lesson:
The whole screen is 1024 bytes, four pages, but STA $0200,X can only reach 256 of them, because X tops out at 255. To cover all four pages you have to change the base address itself. That means a pointer: two bytes in zero page (the fast $00 to $FF region) that together hold a 16-bit address.

The instruction STA ($10),Y reads a 16-bit address out of $10 and $11 (low byte, then high byte), adds Y, and stores there. Fill one page with the Y-loop, then INC the high byte of the pointer to move to the next page, and repeat four times. This indirect-indexed mode is how the 6502 walks through arrays and buffers, the same idea as a C pointer, invented decades before C made it famous. This is the capstone: paint the whole screen.
prompt: Fill the entire 32 by 32 screen ($0200 to $05FF, all 1024 bytes) with a single non-black colour. Use a zero-page pointer and STA ($nn),Y, moving the pointer one page at a time.
starterCode:
; A 16-bit pointer lives in two zero-page bytes: $10 (low), $11 (high).
define ptrLo $10
define ptrHi $11

LDA #$00
STA ptrLo      ; pointer low byte = $00
LDA #$02
STA ptrHi      ; pointer high byte = $02, so the pointer is $0200

LDA #$08       ; the colour to paint (burnt orange)
LDX #$04       ; 4 pages to fill
LDY #$00
loop:
  STA (ptrLo),Y  ; store the colour at pointer + Y
  INY
  BNE loop       ; fill all 256 bytes of this page
  INC ptrHi      ; move the pointer to the next page
  DEX
  BNE loop       ; repeat for 4 pages
BRK
hints: The screen is 1024 bytes, which is four 256-byte pages, $0200 to $05FF.
Put the start address $0200 into a zero-page pointer: low byte $00 at $10, high byte $02 at $11.
Inner loop: STA (ptrLo),Y then INY then BNE fills one page. Then INC ptrHi and DEX to move to the next page.
Keep the colour in A the whole time. INY, INC, and DEX don't touch A.
successText: All 1024 screen bytes ($0200 to $05FF) must be painted.
reference:
define ptrLo $10
define ptrHi $11
LDA #$00
STA ptrLo
LDA #$02
STA ptrHi
LDA #$08
LDX #$04
LDY #$00
loop:
  STA (ptrLo),Y
  INY
  BNE loop
  INC ptrHi
  DEX
  BNE loop
BRK
